3254570.name: Eufloria Classic
3254570.description:
Before Eufloria HD (2014), there was Eufloria (2009). The long-unlisted indie classic is available once again for the 15 year anniversary. Updated to run on modern systems, with new content, features, and expanded moddability.

Old school intergalactic floral warfare is BACK! (Warts and all!)

Before You Buy

Eufloria Classic is a re-release of the original version of Eufloria (2009), with some modern quality of life changes, and not a new Eufloria game nor a sequel to Eufloria HD (2014). It is a “warts and all” anniversary release, with only non-disruptive changes or objective improvements made. Anything that affects the “feel” of the original Eufloria has remained unchanged.

Is this for me?

While Eufloria HD boasts a number of improvements lacking in Eufloria Classic, we are offering a number of things not available elsewhere:

  • It is the only release that supports mods and custom levels, and is backward compatible with all previously released mods that work with the original game.

  • We included two entirely new game modes, with two sample levels per mode. We plan to release more together with the modding community.

  • Entirely new music from the original composer for the game, Milieu.

  • Finally; for some people the original version is the preferred version, despite its limitations, and this allows them to play it once again, pretty much exactly how they remembered it.

Eufloria Classic is free to all owners of Eufloria (2009), simply update and launch that version in your Steam library to see a new option to play Eufloria Classic. It is also heavily discounted for owners of Eufloria HD (2014) via the Steam bundle linked above.

Eufloria (2009) is from a bygone age of small monitors, and as such does not always play nicely with high resolution displays (1440p/4K). The game will still run at high resolutions, but your mileage may vary on visual scaling. If you have a 1440p or higher display, we recommend downloading the demo first to make sure the game displays correctly for you.

If you do encounter issues, there might still be workarounds. These are listed and kept up to date on our Steam forums.

Grow your own Units

Conquer asteroids in space and use their resources to grow floral creatures that do the player's bidding. Expand your empire and fight for resources against several teams of opponents that all vie for the same resources and can offer fierce opposition.

Timeless, Gorgeous and Accessible

Presented in a unique and gorgeous floral aesthetic, the game can be played competitively or in a relaxed, ambient style. You choose how to play.

Endless Replayability

Along a 25 level campaign mode, a host of additional modes offer procedural levels that offer endless replayability. Add to that a vast number of mods and user levels plus an active mod community and you will not soon run out of challenges.

Features:

  • 25 level Single player campaign

  • 8 Level “Skirmish Mode”

  • Unlockable “Dark Matter” mode

  • Hours of wonderful ambient music by “Milieu”

  • Procedural levels – great for replayability

  • Community levels

  • And more

But to celebrate the new release and reward loyal fans we have also added:

  • New “Regrowth” Game Mode

  • New "Gardening" Mode

  • New original music by “Milieu"

  • Enhanced modding options

  • Game Speedup buttons

  • A whole treasure trove of bonus files, art, stories, and concepts

  • Updated UI support

  • Updated Demo
3254570.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 荷兰语, 俄语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 乌克兰语
